arts.ttl: Liverpool and Man United release four statements amid snow chaos as postponement decision made
arts.sum: The latest Liverpool news as there was doubt over if the game against Manchester United at Anfield could go ahead due to heavy snowfall in the area.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim’s true character shown in seven-word warning before Man United face Liverpool
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has sent a clear message to his underperforming Manchester United players ahead of their trip to face Liverpool at Anfield today, with the clock ticking for some in his squad

arts.ttl: Alejandro Garnacho's social media activity speaks volumes ahead of Liverpool vs Man Utd
arts.sum: Alejandro Garnacho has played just 72 minutes in his last three league games for Manchester United after falling out of favour under Ruben Amorim and there is uncertainty around his future

arts.ttl: Gary's helping hand! Neville hilariously tries to get Man United's trip to Anfield cancelled by shovelling snow back ON the pitch amid fears of Liverpool thrashing
arts.sum: Gary Neville hilariously tried his best to get Manchester United 's contest against Liverpool postponed by jokingly shovelling snow back onto the Anfield pitch on Sunday morning.

arts.ttl: How to watch Liverpool vs Man United - live stream, TV channel kick-off time
arts.sum: Premier League leaders Liverpool welcome Manchester United to Anfield this afternoon as they look to extend their advantage at the top

arts.ttl: Three Man United team news hints dropped for Liverpool clash suggest Ruben Amorim rethink
arts.sum: Manchester United will head to Anfield on Sunday afternoon despite worries that the game against Liverpool would be postponed

arts.ttl: Michael Owen's reaction to whether he's a 'Liverpool legend' speaks volumes
arts.sum: Michael Owen spent years at Liverpool before later tarnishing his Anfield reputation by joining arch-rivals Manchester United, and the man himself has had his say regarding his Reds status

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim's stark seven-word warning to Man Utd strugglers before Liverpool clash
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim will face the toughest test of his Manchester United career so far when he leads his players away to Anfield to take on the league leaders Liverpool

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs. Manchester United to Go Ahead Despite Heavy Snow
arts.sum: Sunday's Premier League match at Anfield will take place after two safety inspections were carried out before the match.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Manchester United LIVE! Premier League match stream, latest team news, lineups, TV, prediction
arts.sum: The Merseyside giants are aiming to inflict more misery on their bitter rivals
